history.notes: Major: Responsive design — desktop side-rail, multi-column home, two-pane settings. Worker proxy restored with mode toggle. Persistent Storage API with live usage. Chat layout overhaul — composer no longer overlaps content, fixed-height stream, keyboard shortcuts.
Default language is now EN. No-key flow opens a friendly setup sheet. Welcome card shows SETUP button when no provider key is present.
Initial SmartApp release. Modular shell + JSON config. Chat module live. 5 modules scheduled.
